title: Phoenix Adventures
openingHistory: The road bends toward SRAC'S, a warm tavern at the edge of a ruined school-castle.

strength.label: Strength
strength.description: Raw power, athletics, climbing, lifting, and weapon strikes.

intelligence.label: Intelligence
intelligence.description: Memory, study, arcana, investigation, and tactical planning.

wisdom.label: Wisdom
wisdom.description: Awareness, insight, survival, medicine, and reading a room.

dexterity.label: Dexterity
dexterity.description: Agility, stealth, balance, archery, and quick hands.

constitution.label: Constitution
constitution.description: Endurance, grit, resistance, and how many hits you can take.

charisma.label: Charisma
charisma.description: Presence, persuasion, performance, and force of personality.

races.name: Dragonborn of the Fountaingrove Clan
races.quote: I am {name} of the Fountaingrove Clan.
races.summary: Proud, direct, and marked by old draconic traditions without belonging to any one color lineage. Their people are known as the Fountaingrove Clan.
races.advice: A strong fit for fighters, paladins, sorcerers, and bold leaders.

races.name: Dragonborn of the Skyhawk Clan
races.quote: I am {name} of the Skyhawk Clan.
races.summary: Proud, direct, and marked by old draconic traditions without belonging to any one color lineage. Their people are known as the Skyhawk Clan.
races.advice: A strong fit for fighters, paladins, sorcerers, and bold leaders.

races.name: Hill Dwarf of the Benet Vale Holds
races.quote: I am {name} of the Benet Vale Holds.
races.summary: Steady, patient, and hard to wear down on long roads or in deep ruins. Their people are known as the Benet Vale Holds.
races.advice: A strong fit for clerics, fighters, paladins, and resilient guides.

races.name: Hill Dwarf of the Gracefield Hearths
races.quote: I am {name} of the Gracefield Hearths.
races.summary: Steady, patient, and hard to wear down on long roads or in deep ruins. Their people are known as the Gracefield Hearths.
races.advice: A strong fit for clerics, fighters, paladins, and resilient guides.

races.name: Mountain Dwarf of the Rincon Vale Holds
races.quote: I am {name} of the Rincon Vale Holds.
races.summary: Strong, practical, and comfortable with stone, metal, and stubborn problems. Their people are known as the Rincon Vale Holds.
races.advice: A strong fit for fighters, paladins, clerics, and inventors.

races.name: Mountain Dwarf of the Lomita High Forge
races.quote: I am {name} of the Lomita High Forge.
races.summary: Strong, practical, and comfortable with stone, metal, and stubborn problems. Their people are known as the Lomita High Forge.
races.advice: A strong fit for fighters, paladins, clerics, and inventors.

races.name: High Elf of the Madrone Court
races.quote: I am {name} of the Madrone Court.
races.summary: Studious, precise, and drawn to old names, maps, songs, and hidden rules. Their people are known as the Madrone Court.
races.advice: A strong fit for wizards, bards, rogues, and careful strategists.

races.name: High Elf of the Cherrybough Court
races.quote: I am {name} of the Cherrybough Court.
races.summary: Studious, precise, and drawn to old names, maps, songs, and hidden rules. Their people are known as the Cherrybough Court.
races.advice: A strong fit for wizards, bards, rogues, and careful strategists.

races.name: Wood Elf of the Hidden Vale Groves
races.quote: I am {name} of the Hidden Vale Groves.
races.summary: Quick, watchful, and comfortable moving through overgrown halls and shaded courtyards. Their people are known as the Hidden Vale Groves.
races.advice: A strong fit for rangers, rogues, bards, and wise scouts.

races.name: Wood Elf of the Oakmont Groves
races.quote: I am {name} of the Oakmont Groves.
races.summary: Quick, watchful, and comfortable moving through overgrown halls and shaded courtyards. Their people are known as the Oakmont Groves.
races.advice: A strong fit for rangers, rogues, bards, and wise scouts.

races.name: Dark Elf of the Westmark Enclave
races.quote: I am {name} of the Westmark Enclave.
races.summary: Sharp-eyed, self-possessed, and practiced at reading danger before it moves. Their people are known as the Westmark Enclave.
races.advice: A strong fit for rogues, warlocks, wizards, and tactical scouts.

races.name: Dark Elf of the Rosecrypt Enclave
races.quote: I am {name} of the Rosecrypt Enclave.
races.summary: Sharp-eyed, self-possessed, and practiced at reading danger before it moves. Their people are known as the Rosecrypt Enclave.
races.advice: A strong fit for rogues, warlocks, wizards, and tactical scouts.

races.name: Lightfoot Halfling of the Ironroad Caravan
races.quote: I am {name} of the Ironroad Caravan.
races.summary: Lucky, bright-hearted, and hard to corner in a crowded room. Their people are known as the Ironroad Caravan.
races.advice: A strong fit for rogues, bards, rangers, and nimble paladins.

races.name: Lightfoot Halfling of the Mont Vale Roads
races.quote: I am {name} of the Mont Vale Roads.
races.summary: Lucky, bright-hearted, and hard to corner in a crowded room. Their people are known as the Mont Vale Roads.
races.advice: A strong fit for rogues, bards, rangers, and nimble paladins.

races.name: Stout Halfling of the Cofield Hearths
races.quote: I am {name} of the Cofield Hearths.
races.summary: Grounded, brave, and surprisingly tough when trouble gets close. Their people are known as the Cofield Hearths.
races.advice: A strong fit for rogues, clerics, fighters, and steady companions.

races.name: Stout Halfling of the Burrbank Hearths
races.quote: I am {name} of the Burrbank Hearths.
races.summary: Grounded, brave, and surprisingly tough when trouble gets close. Their people are known as the Burrbank Hearths.
races.advice: A strong fit for rogues, clerics, fighters, and steady companions.

races.name: Forest Gnome of the Hollen Hollows
races.quote: I am {name} of the Hollen Hollows.
races.summary: Clever, quiet, and good at noticing small signs that others miss. Their people are known as the Hollen Hollows.
races.advice: A strong fit for wizards, druids, rangers, and careful scouts.

races.name: Forest Gnome of the Southgrove Hollows
races.quote: I am {name} of the Southgrove Hollows.
races.summary: Clever, quiet, and good at noticing small signs that others miss. Their people are known as the Southgrove Hollows.
races.advice: A strong fit for wizards, druids, rangers, and careful scouts.

races.name: Rock Gnome of the Stonegate Workshops
races.quote: I am {name} of the Stonegate Workshops.
races.summary: Inventive, precise, and delighted by locks, gears, maps, and practical puzzles. Their people are known as the Stonegate Workshops.
races.advice: A strong fit for wizards, artificers, rogues, and problem-solvers.

races.name: Rock Gnome of the Valley Oak Workshops
races.quote: I am {name} of the Valley Oak Workshops.
races.summary: Inventive, precise, and delighted by locks, gears, maps, and practical puzzles. Their people are known as the Valley Oak Workshops.
races.advice: A strong fit for wizards, artificers, rogues, and problem-solvers.

races.quote: I am {name} of the Juniper Crossroads.
races.summary: Adaptable, observant, and used to seeing a problem from more than one side. Their people are known as the Juniper Crossroads.
races.advice: A strong fit for bards, paladins, warlocks, rogues, and diplomats.

races.advice: A strong fit for bards, paladins, warlocks, rogues, and diplomats.

races.advice: A strong fit for fighters, barbarians, paladins, and guardians.

races.advice: A strong fit for warlocks, bards, sorcerers, paladins, and bold leaders.

alignments.name: Lawful Good
alignments.summary: Protect others by honoring promises, order, and mercy.

alignments.name: Neutral Good
alignments.summary: Do the kind thing, even when rules or factions complicate it.

alignments.name: Chaotic Good
alignments.summary: Break bad rules, help the vulnerable, and improvise freely.

alignments.name: Lawful Neutral
alignments.summary: Trust codes, duties, contracts, and the structure of the realm.

alignments.name: True Neutral
alignments.summary: Keep balance, stay pragmatic, and avoid being owned by any side.

alignments.name: Chaotic Neutral
alignments.summary: Value freedom, curiosity, and the right to choose your own path.

alignments.name: Lawful Evil
alignments.summary: Seek power through systems, bargains, leverage, and control.

alignments.name: Neutral Evil
alignments.summary: Prioritize ambition, advantage, and survival over sentiment.

alignments.name: Chaotic Evil
alignments.summary: Pursue appetite and upheaval without much patience for limits.

backgrounds.name: Courtyard Storyteller
backgrounds.summary: You learned how to hold a circle's attention and make strangers lean in.
backgrounds.choiceText: I have a story for the outdoor tables.
details: You know how to turn rumors into useful introductions.
People tend to remember you after a good tale.

backgrounds.name: Library Apprentice
backgrounds.summary: You indexed dangerous books before you were old enough to read all the warnings.
backgrounds.choiceText: I learned from the shelves and locked drawers.
details: You can research a clue faster than most.
Old inscriptions feel less intimidating to you.

backgrounds.name: Field Scout
backgrounds.summary: You crossed ruined paths, watched weather signs, and mapped safe routes.
backgrounds.choiceText: I know the ways between walls and woods.
details: You notice tracks, broken branches, and unsafe footing.
You are comfortable camping away from the main road.

backgrounds.name: Workshop Runner
backgrounds.summary: You carried parts through the tinkerer rooms and learned which sparks mattered.
details: You understand simple devices and locked cabinets.
You can talk to builders, smiths, and inventors without sounding lost.

languages.name: Common
languages.summary: The trade tongue used across the keep.

languages.name: Elvish
languages.summary: Elegant speech of old groves, moonlit songs, and careful promises.

languages.name: Dwarvish
languages.summary: Clipped, sturdy words built for craft, oath, and stone.

languages.name: Halfling
languages.summary: Warm road-speech full of food names, nicknames, and practical jokes.

languages.name: Draconic
languages.summary: Ancient syllables found in spell margins and heat-scarred tablets.

languages.name: Sylvan
languages.summary: Fey language of briars, bargains, music, and half-hidden paths.

languages.name: Celestial
languages.summary: Radiant script used in vows, wards, blessings, and high records.

languages.name: Goblin
languages.summary: Fast camp-talk useful for tunnels, traps, and sharp bargaining.

skills.name: Acrobatics
skills.summary: Balance, flips, landings, and staying upright when things go sideways.

skills.name: Animal Handling
skills.summary: Calm, guide, and read creatures that do not speak your language.

skills.name: Arcana
skills.summary: Identify spells, magical creatures, sigils, and old enchantments.

skills.name: Athletics
skills.summary: Climb, jump, swim, shove, and do difficult physical work.

skills.name: Deception
skills.summary: Lie, bluff, disguise intentions, and keep a false story steady.

skills.name: History
skills.summary: Recall kingdoms, legends, battles, lineages, and local lore.

skills.name: Insight
skills.summary: Read motives, mood, pressure, and what a person is not saying.

skills.name: Intimidation
skills.summary: Apply pressure through presence, threat, reputation, or nerve.

skills.name: Investigation
skills.summary: Search carefully, connect clues, and inspect mechanisms.

skills.name: Medicine
skills.summary: Stabilize wounds, identify illness, and understand remedies.

skills.name: Nature
skills.summary: Know plants, weather, terrain, beasts, and natural hazards.

skills.name: Perception
skills.summary: Notice hidden movement, faint sounds, ambushes, and small details.

skills.name: Performance
skills.summary: Sing, speak, act, dance, play, and hold an audience.

skills.name: Persuasion
skills.summary: Earn trust, negotiate, encourage, and make a fair case.

skills.name: Religion
skills.summary: Understand rites, gods, temples, omens, and sacred symbols.

skills.name: Sleight of Hand
skills.summary: Palm objects, pick pockets, hide small motions, and manipulate delicate things.

skills.name: Stealth
skills.summary: Move quietly, hide, and stay unseen in shadow or cover.

skills.name: Survival
skills.summary: Track, forage, navigate, predict weather, and avoid wilderness trouble.

proficiencies.name: Shields
proficiencies.summary: A carried defense for careful advances.

proficiencies.name: Simple Weapons
proficiencies.summary: Clubs, daggers, maces, spears, and other practical arms.

proficiencies.name: Martial Weapons
proficiencies.summary: Specialized battlefield weapons that reward training.

proficiencies.name: Thieves' Tools
proficiencies.summary: Picks, probes, clamps, and tiny files for locks and traps.

proficiencies.name: Tinker's Tools
proficiencies.summary: Small instruments for repairs, gadgets, and field fixes.

proficiencies.name: Herbalism Kit
proficiencies.summary: Pouches, clippers, vials, and knowledge for simple remedies.

proficiencies.name: Musical Instrument
proficiencies.summary: Training with one instrument or performance tradition.

classes.name: Wizard
classes.summary: A scholar of spellcraft who solves problems with preparation and arcane force.
details: Uses Intelligence for spellcasting.
Starts fragile but grows into deep utility.

classes.name: Paladin
classes.summary: A sworn champion who mixes armor, courage, healing, and radiant judgment.
details: Uses Charisma for divine features.
Wants strength, toughness, and presence.

classes.name: Ranger
classes.summary: A pathfinder who reads terrain, tracks threats, and fights at the edge of danger.
details: Rewards strong Wisdom and Dexterity.
Good at exploration and ranged combat.

classes.name: Rogue
classes.summary: A specialist in stealth, timing, careful hands, and decisive strikes.
details: Uses Dexterity for most core tricks.
Excellent at skills, traps, and precision.

classes.name: Bard
classes.summary: A performer and lore-keeper who turns charm, courage, and music into magic.
details: Uses Charisma for spellcasting.
Good at helping allies and changing the tone of a scene.

classes.name: Tinkerer
classes.summary: A workshop hero who builds clever tools, field repairs, and strange devices.
details: Rewards clever plans and tool use.
A flexible homebrew class for STEM workshop scenes.

bundles.name: Traveler's Rations
bundles.summary: Dry fruit, oat cakes, cheese, and a corked flask of water.

bundles.name: Healer's Lunch
bundles.summary: Soup, clean cloth, honey candy, and a small tonic.

bundles.name: Trail Snacks
bundles.summary: Nuts, dried berries, hard candy, and a waxed paper pouch.

bundles.name: Light and Ward
bundles.summary: Simple utility magic for dark halls and locked nerves.
items: Library Spell Notes: Light and Ward

bundles.name: Ember and Frost
bundles.summary: Elemental tricks for dramatic problem solving.
items: Library Spell Notes: Ember and Frost

bundles.name: Message and Mending
bundles.summary: Quiet cantrips for clever heroes and careful plans.
items: Library Spell Notes: Message and Mending

bundles.name: Lute
bundles.summary: Warm strings for stories, courage, and tavern corners.

bundles.name: Hand Drum
bundles.summary: A steady beat for marching nerves and battle tempo.

bundles.name: Silver Flute
bundles.summary: Bright notes for misdirection, charm, and moonlit halls.

bundles.name: Light Kit
bundles.summary: Leather armor, a shortbow, and a repaired utility knife.

bundles.name: Shield Kit
bundles.summary: A reinforced shield, a mace, and a polished helm.

bundles.name: Workshop Tools
bundles.summary: Tinker's tools, wire, chalk, and a careful set of pliers.
